name: Fulgar S.p.A.
message: Fulgar S.p.A. is an international leader in the production of polyamide yarns and covered elastomers, known for its commitment to quality, innovation, and sustainability. The company offers a range of innovative textile solutions, including eco-friendly and biodegradable fibers, catering to the global textile and technical markets. Fulgar's products, such as Q-CYCLE and AMNI SOUL ECO, emphasize environmental responsibility while maintaining high performance standards.
